title: Frontier Code (GPT-5.6 VS Mythos): This BENCHMARK is ACTUALLY REAL!
summary: Cognition released FrontierCode, a benchmark that measures whether AI-generated code is mergeable in real pull requests, using blocker criteria and maintainer-defined rubrics. It evaluates models on code quality beyond test passage, covering 36 open-source repositories and multiple programming languages.
